subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! Be thou not grieved by the affairs of this base world, nor dismayed by the tribulations of this fleeting realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی از شئون این جهان دون محزون مشو و از غوائل این عالم زائل
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
